case_title: GEORGE LANCIA VS. SPECK CAB COMPANY, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LANCIA, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT SPECK CAB COMPANY, INC. DBA. AND HEREINAFTER " ARROW CAB) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FILED AT INSISTENCE OF LITIGANT - FEE FOR SERVICE $89.00 - SERVED MAY-27-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SPECK CAB COMPANY, INC. DBA. AND HEREINAFTER " ARROW CAB)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 189.15 - SERVED JUN-24-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SPECK CAB COMPANY, INC. DBA. AND HEREINAFTER " ARROW CAB)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LANCIA, GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPECK CAB COMPANY, INC. DBA. AND HEREINAFTER " ARROW CAB) $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $353.15 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,353.15 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF LANCIA, GEORGE
FEE FOR COURT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LANCIA, GEORGE
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LANCIA, GEORGE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2015 - JUDGMENT.
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-24-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY PAULINA TRAN. DEFECTIVE POS, PLAINTIFF TO RE-SERVE THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
